name: Web Scout MCP
what_it_does: Web Scout MCP server enabling AI agents to search the web and extract content — performing web searches via Brave Search API, scraping and extracting content from web pages, summarizing page content, and integrating web search and content retrieval into agent-driven research and information gathering workflows.
use_cases: Searching the web for current information from research agents
Extracting and summarizing web page content from content analysis agents
Gathering competitor information from market research agents
Finding documentation and tutorials from coding assistant agents
Monitoring web content changes from tracking agents
Researching topics with current web data from knowledge agents
not_for: Academic paper search (use Google Scholar MCP for scholarly content)
High-volume scraping (Brave Search API has rate limits)
JavaScript-heavy SPAs (static content extraction may miss dynamic content)
best_when: An agent needs to search the web and retrieve page content — for research tasks requiring current information beyond the model's training cutoff.
avoid_when: You need authenticated content, JavaScript-rendered pages, or high-volume scraping — consider Puppeteer MCP for dynamic content.

auth.notes: Brave Search API key required for web search functionality. Free tier available from Brave. Content extraction from URLs may work without additional auth.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Brave Search API: 2,000 queries/month free tier
pricing.paid_tiers: Brave Search API: $3/1,000 queries beyond free tier
pricing.notes: Brave Search API has a generous free tier. Community MCP server is free and open source. Brave account required for API key.

performance.rate_limits: Brave Search API: 1 req/second (free), higher on paid tiers

known_agent_gotchas: Brave Search API key required — must register at brave.com/search/api
Free tier limited to 2,000 queries/month — monitor usage carefully
Web content extraction quality varies by site structure
JavaScript-rendered content may not be extracted accurately
Community MCP — feature set may be limited compared to dedicated scrapers
Rate limit: 1 request/second on free tier — add delays for bulk operations
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced for Brave API. Store Brave API key as environment variable. Community MCP. No user data stored. Respect robots.txt and site ToS when scraping.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Brave API key required. Community MCP. Store API key securely. No user data stored by MCP.
